name: triprender
description: Mapbox route finder — Tauri shell for desktop and mobile

scripts.dev:server: node scripts/free-port-1420.js && npm run build:web && npx serve dist -l 1420
scripts.tauri:dev: npm run build:web && node scripts/tauri-with-rustup.js dev
scripts.tauri:build: npm run build:web && node scripts/tauri-with-rustup.js build
scripts.tauri:ios: npm run build:web && node scripts/tauri-with-rustup.js ios dev
scripts.tauri:ios:sim: npm run build:web && node scripts/ensure-simulator-booted.js "iPhone 16" && node scripts/tauri-with-rustup.js ios dev iPhone 16
scripts.tauri:android: npm run build:web && node scripts/tauri-with-rustup.js android dev
